description_long: This is a black bucket hat adorned with a variety of colorful decorative elements, including large geometric gems, a pair of green-lensed sunglasses, and two playing cards (the Queen of Hearts and the Ace of Clubs) tucked into the brim. The hat features a wide, flat brim and a cylindrical crown, with a pink band encircling the base of the crown. The surface of the hat is glossy, giving it a slightly reflective appearance, and the decorative elements are distributed around the hat, adding a playful and eclectic flair. The sunglasses are attached to the front, while the playing cards and gems are positioned at various points around the brim. This hat would stand out in an urban environment due to its unique and whimsical embellishments.
description: A glossy black bucket hat with a pink band, decorated with colorful gems, sunglasses, and playing cards. The hat has a wide, flat brim and a cylindrical crown.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the pink band, three colorful gems, and a partial glimpse of the sunglasses and playing cards.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the green gem, a red gem, and the side of the sunglasses, with less visibility of the playing cards.
description_view_2: Direct front view featuring the green-lensed sunglasses prominently attached to the pink band, with gems and cards partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear-right view displaying the two playing cards tucked into the brim, several gems, and a side view of the sunglasses.
